reasoning: The aim is to tackle your lactate clearance limiter. Given the recent extended rest and lower intensity last ride, start controlled with targeted efforts at Emigration Canyon to build your aerobic base and fatigue resistance. This will prepare you for sustaining high power on climbs like those in the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Warmup
suggested_sets.description: Easy spin building to tempo work

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Over-unders: 6x (2min at 242W, 2min at 218W) with 2min easy spin between sets. Focus on maintaining control and managing heart rate.

suggested_sets.name: Cooldown
suggested_sets.description: Easy spin to flush out lactate

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
